prompt: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} vertical — {argument name="subject" default="Japanese Fuji film style portrait, single subject"}  Fujifilm analog aesthetic (Pro 400H / Superia feel), soft pastel tones, slight green-magenta shift, low contrast, gentle highlight roll-off, fine film grain, subtle halation, slight vignette  bright natural daylight, diffused sunlight through window, soft shadows, airy atmosphere  young Japanese female idol, natural minimal makeup, fresh glowing skin, realistic texture, slight imperfections  outfit: Japanese school uniform (sailor-style or blazer uniform), neatly styled, non-revealing, youthful and clean  hair: natural dark hair, straight or softly flowing, a few loose strands  pose: front-facing or slight angle toward camera, relaxed posture; one hand gently holding a strawberry near lips, mid-action as if about to take a bite; shoulders relaxed, subtle natural body curve  expression: soft playful gaze, light smile or neutral lips, gentle eye contact with camera  setting: minimal indoor near window or simple outdoor corner, clean background, everyday atmosphere  composition: slightly off-center framing, intimate distance, candid feel  mood: fresh, youthful, sweet everyday moment, understated charm  quality: ultra-realistic, analog film look, natural imperfections, soft dreamy finish
translatedPrompt: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} 竖屏 — {argument name="subject" default="日系富士胶片风格人像，单人主体"} 富士胶片模拟美学（Pro 400H / Superia 质感），柔和的粉彩色调，轻微的绿-洋红偏移，低对比度，柔和的高光过渡，细腻的胶片颗粒，微妙的光晕，轻微暗角；明亮的自然日光，透过窗户的漫射阳光，柔和的阴影，通透的氛围；年轻的日本女性偶像，自然淡妆，清新透亮的皮肤，写实的质感，细微的瑕疵；服装：日式校服（水手服或西装制服），整洁，不暴露，青春且干净；发型：自然的深色头发，直发或柔顺飘逸，几缕碎发；姿势：正对或微侧向镜头，放松的姿态；一只手轻轻拿着草莓靠近嘴边，仿佛正要咬下去的瞬间；肩膀放松，自然的身体曲线；表情：柔和俏皮的目光，轻微的微笑或自然唇形，与镜头进行温柔的眼神交流；场景：窗边简约室内或简单的户外角落，干净的背景，日常氛围；构图：略微偏心的构图，亲密的距离，抓拍感；情绪：清新、青春、甜蜜的日常瞬间，低调的魅力；画质：超写实，模拟胶片感，自然的瑕疵，柔和梦幻的质感

breakdown.creativeCore: 日系富士胶片风格人像：一份详细的提示词，用于创作一张写实的胶片风格人像，展现手持草莓的日本偶像，具有柔和的光影和自然的质感。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: front-facing, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。
